channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-05 21:04 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Users who interact with a misleading post that is subsequently corrected by@CommunityNoteswill recei...
item.description: Users who interact with a misleading post that is subsequently corrected by@CommunityNoteswill receive an 𝕏 Chat message of the CN to correct any misperception

item.title: @elonmusk: Come visit our CVPR booth for hands-on experiences: – Neural video generation + sim drive – Selfies ...
item.description: Come visit our CVPR booth for hands-on experiences: – Neural video generation + sim drive – Selfies with@Tesla_Optimus– Real FSD test drives in Tesla models of your choice Chat directly with the team behind it, including@aelluswamy&@pduanand other engineers to get answers to your questions. Recruiters are also on-site for career opportunities. While others talk about autonomous driving, Tesla is the only one solving it in the real world with a true long-term approach. Come experience live demos and grab some swag!

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build now operates within your project files. Full read and write plus all new files end up in ...
item.description: Grok Build now operates within your project files. Full read and write plus all new files end up in the project. Big improvement for enterprise workflow creation. You can simply type "work within my project folder called "Folder Name" or type in terminal. cd /folder path/grok_project_folder grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Henry Nowak died the same way a civilization dies: abandoned, handcuffed by authorities who neither ...
item.description: Henry Nowak died the same way a civilization dies: abandoned, handcuffed by authorities who neither trusted nor cared for him, and accused of hate crimes he did not commit. His murder is as tragic as it is enraging. He should still be alive today, and he would be if the last few generations of European elites had stood their ground against the politics of self-hatred and the mass invasion of migrants, many of whom despise the West and the people who love it. Henry was far from the first to so needlessly lose his life, and I fear he won’t be the last. Each time a life like his is lost, the proper response—the only response—is righteous anger. One of the most important things the Trump administration has proven to the world is that stopping the flow of mass migration and defending national sovereignty is a matter of political will and leadership. Anything else is an excuse. It is because we love the West that we want to preserve it. We love our civilization. We love our country. We love our children. And nobody—nobody—should ever die the way that Henry Nowak died. May God comfort those who loved him, and may God rest his soul.

item.title: @elonmusk: They should change their name to the Southern False Flag Center!
item.description: They should change their name to the Southern False Flag Center!

item.title: @elonmusk: 🤔 Can’t think of a single time this happened
item.description: 🤔 Can’t think of a single time this happened

item.title: @elonmusk: Working with agents should feel like working with a colleague. You should be able “speak to” them no...
item.description: Working with agents should feel like working with a colleague. You should be able “speak to” them not just with text chats, but by gesturing at a screen together, talking live, etc.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk just gave a massive update on Community Notes Users who interact with a misleading post th...
item.description: Elon Musk just gave a massive update on Community Notes Users who interact with a misleading post that is later corrected by Community Notes will now receive the correction directly through X Chat This is a huge upgrade People who saw the original claim will now actually see the correction too 𝕏 is the platform where truth shines and this step takes it even closer to the truth

item.title: @elonmusk: How did white people become the protectors and defenders of every group except white people?
item.description: How did white people become the protectors and defenders of every group except white people?

item.title: @elonmusk: Europe has no-go zones in Paris and London. That’s our future if we don’t stop mass Islamic immigrat...
item.description: Europe has no-go zones in Paris and London. That’s our future if we don’t stop mass Islamic immigration.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla Cybercab will change the look of roads forever. The future is autonomous.
item.description: Tesla Cybercab will change the look of roads forever. The future is autonomous.

item.title: @elonmusk: Storyboarding in Grok@imaginewas pretty fun. I really like how the agents help visualize some of the...
item.description: Storyboarding in Grok@imaginewas pretty fun. I really like how the agents help visualize some of the important historical events. I was trying to iterate through the clothing and voices from the ancient Chinese drawing to reflect on the historical fact and it was fun to interact with.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX just quietly amended its S-1 announcing another mega deal $920M/month from Google from Octobe...
item.description: SpaceX just quietly amended its S-1 announcing another mega deal $920M/month from Google from October 2026 through June 2029 With both parties being able to terminate the agreement with 90 days notice Things are getting exciting 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk says Orbital AI Data Centers will be easier than Communication Satellites for SpaceX: "The...
item.description: Elon Musk says Orbital AI Data Centers will be easier than Communication Satellites for SpaceX: "The Starlink V3 communications satellites is an incredibly complex machine. The AI Data Center will be much simpler by comparison. It’s really just solar power, plus radiator, some basic equipment, and the laser links would connect to the Starlink communications constellation, and then to the ground."
